title: A big “V” shaped black UFO spotted by 3 air traffic controllers in Manaus [2010]

text_preview:
NOV 15, 2010. At 18h55pm, during 15 minutes, two military operators and a meteorologist working at Eduardo Gomes Airport’s Control Tower spotted a large, dark unidentified flying object with a “V” shape and moving at high speed in the Northeast / Southwest direction. According to the observers’ report, the UFO traveled “apparently above the flight level of an ordinary aircraft, leaving behind what appeared to be condensation trails.

Following the additional observations of the COMDABRA [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command] report: “TWR-EG operator, called informing that he had seen a UFO flyi
summary: Two military operators and a meteorologist at Manaus Eduardo Gomes Airport control tower observed a large dark V-shaped UFO leaving condensation trails and traveling at high speed.
